## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and The RealReal for AI-assisted content creation and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The RealReal values authenticity highly and is cautious about AI content, but open to exploring efficiencies](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Current blog content is thin and lacks substance; opportunity to create more authoritative, data-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-assisted content creation with human oversight and customization](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Potential to significantly improve SEO and content quality through partnership, pending further exploration](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Topics

### The RealReal's Current Content Approach

  - [Editorial team handles storytelling across all channels (copy, social, campaigns, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Small team looking to optimize and scale content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Blog content currently thin and lacking substance/authority](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Authenticity is critical; careful balance needed with AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Data-driven and service-oriented content seen as key opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Assisted Content Creation

  - [End-to-end support from strategy to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Custom AI workflows with human oversight at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Platform features: content briefs, research, fact-checking, internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [Can adapt to brand voice, style guidelines, data sources](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Typical output of 5-15 articles per week during execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)

### Content Strategy and Opportunities

  - [Significant SEO potential identified (2.8M search volume opportunity)](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Focus on authoritative, ownable, data-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Blend editorial with product/shopping content (e.g. "How to shop for vintage Prada")](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [Potential to create complementary video content](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Opportunity to refresh/improve existing thin content](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Implementation and Integration

  - [6-8 week initial strategy sprint to develop roadmap, artifacts, calibrate content](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2788.0)
  - [Execution phase aims for daily publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
  - [Pricing typically $12-15k/month, can scale up for higher volume](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2915.0)
  - [Potential to integrate The RealReal's proprietary data into content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=2968.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share strategy document and additional info](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [The RealReal to review proposal and consider potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting if needed to address any remaining questions](https://fathom.video/share/x-d_bJmNgYxiyNhtvti1Gu_JpVZqTeF9?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
